title: hello.food GET /v1/auth/capabilities response contract v1
description: Single canonical machine-readable contract for the GET /v1/auth/capabilities response (CliAuthCapabilitiesResponse), shared between the private backend (frntrllc/hellofood) and language-neutral clients (the Rust heyfood rewrite; released Python CLI v0.3.2 until cutover). SOURCE OF TRUTH for the response shape including the P0 C4 additive application_capabilities map (honest feature detection) and the pre-existing self_registration / authorization / profile_readiness shapes. WIRE COMPATIBILITY IS A HARD CONSTRAINT: released v0.3.2 parses this response today; every pre-C4 field is byte-identical, and application_capabilities is a purely additive key an older client ignores. The backend parity test (tests/test_scope_tier_contract.py) verifies the Pydantic CliAuthCapabilitiesResponse fields and the recorded wire fixtures against THIS file.

capabilities_response.description: The GET /v1/auth/capabilities response body. Unauthenticated, default-off account-resolution feature detection.

schema_version.description: Response schema version. Unchanged by C4 (application_capabilities is additive, not a schema-version bump).

profile_readiness.description: True when at least one authorization flow is live and not quiesced.

application_capabilities.description: P0 C4 additive. Map of DEPLOYED application domain -> served contract version, e.g. {"grocery": "v1"}. DEPLOYED-TRUTH: an entry appears ONLY when the code+config serving it is deployed; EMPTY today. Distinct from OAuth scopes_supported (login negotiation, unchanged): a scope can be grantable long before its feature ships, so capability MUST NOT be inferred from a scope. Source of truth: app.core.application_capabilities.APPLICATION_CAPABILITIES.

self_registration_capability.description: self_registration object shape (SelfRegistrationCapability). Unchanged by C4.

authorization_capability.description: authorization object shape (AuthorizationCapability). Unchanged by C4.

wire_compatibility.description: The pre-C4 field set the released CLI v0.3.2 parses. Every one of these MUST remain byte-identical; application_capabilities is the only key C4 adds.
